channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Various rubbish left by electrical cupboard, 28th March
item.description:
Various rubbish left by electrical cupboard. Please also note the door to the electrical cupboard has come off - someone needs to attend and fix this.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Culford Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bedford Row, 28th March
item.description:
Someone has covered up the no entry signs with bin bags

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 37-41, Bedford Row, Holborn, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Crumbled pavement a trip hazard, 28th March
item.description:
The pavement outside the Nautical School on 🔑 Duchy Street is crumbled and large chunks of the pavement a strewn across it. This is a major trip hazard. I have kicked as much of the debris to the side of the pavement as I can but it is still extremely dangerous and in this narrow footpath needs to be removed immediately.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Stamford Street, Waterloo, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Looks like human faeces, 28th March
item.description:
Pile of what looks like human poo
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Rochester Way, Blackfen, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Layby, 28th March
item.description:
Please have this. I saw removed ASAP as it’s becoming a magnet for more scumbags to dump their rubbish.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Goodwin Road, Edmonton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Outside 14 lower terrace, 28th March
item.description:
This has doubled in the last week and is now getting deep

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 14, Lower Terrace, West Hampstead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree need pruning, 28th March
item.description:
The tree is overgrown and will soon be touching the windows in my property. When the wind picks up some branches tap the window. Also once the tree blooms it will affect the view and sunlight of the property.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Pickhurst Park, Hayes, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree blocking half the road, 28th March
item.description:
Tree has come down partially blocking the entrance to the Chislehurst High Street car park from the adjacent property
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Queens Road, Chislehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish, 28th March
item.description:
Flipping in the road

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Evering Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipped bin bags and waste outside flat 28, 28th March
item.description:
Constant fly tipping and waste all over pavement

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Median Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overflowing bin outside corbiere, 28th March
item.description:
The bin is inaccesible

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): De Beauvoir Estate, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead fox, 28th March
item.description:
Dead fox. Infront of garage next to bus stop on corner of Sewell Road/Church manor way. Infront of houses 161 and 162 Sewell Road
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Sewell Road, Abbey Wood
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Gray Ammaco, 28th March
item.description:
Please remove

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 145, Hornsey Road, Holloway, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped sofa and rubbish, 28th March
item.description:
Yet again rubbish dumped outside the bin store including a sofa. This happened a weekly & needs to be sorted as it’s filthy!

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Queensbridge Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter dumped on the pavement and road., 28th March
item.description:
Dumped litter on the road, just by butterfield close SE16 4PZ and could fly all over the place if it is not remove.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Wilson Grove, Bermondsey, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned Lime Bike, 28th March
item.description:
Bike no: SZR-RUD Lime bike abandoned next to tree in Parish Lane SE20, opposite vet surgery

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Parish Lane, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Motorbike parked on disabled parking, 28th March
item.description:
Individual leaving in flat 34 leaving his motorbike parked several times in disabled parking ,obstructing parking for suitable users and occupying excessive space not allocated for motorcycles. Episodes happening since 2 weeks .

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Priors Mead, Enfield
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping in rubbish bin, 28th March
item.description:
Fly tipping in 9 Bell Yard Mews rubbish bin. Name on fly tipping says Jaz Macdonald se1 3Ty
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 7, Bell Yard Mews, Old Kent Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping outside NISA Barry Road, 28th March
item.description:
Flytipping Barry Road to be cleared asap

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 38, Barry Road, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: The roundabout at the bottom of Gravel hill has lots of some chips that need to sweep and cleared, 28th March
item.description:
Sine the roundabout has been resurfaced there is now a lot of lose stone chipping that require to sweeper and cleared as they could cause damage to a vehicle or a car windscreen. *** Also thanks for repaired the road surface at the top of gravel hill
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Queens Road, North End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
